hero.title:
Your business never sleeps.
Neither should your concierge.
hero.subtitle: MonaConcierge replies to your guests in under 5 seconds, around the clock, in their language.
hero.proof: Launching with select establishments in Monaco

social.label: Trusted by venues across Monaco and the Cote d'Azur

problem.title: You're losing clients without knowing it

items.title: Missed messages at night = lost clients
items.desc: A guest who doesn't hear back before midnight books your competitor by morning.

items.title: FR, EN, RU clients are hard to serve
items.desc: Monaco draws the world. Responding in three languages at the same quality is impossible without help.

items.title: Staff time wasted on repetitive questions
items.desc: Hours, menu, availability — your team answers the same questions ten times a day.

solution.title: MonaConcierge solves all of this
solution.tagline: Responds in 5 seconds. 24/7. In their language.

items.title: Zero missed messages
items.desc: Every message gets an instant reply, at any hour. Your establishment never goes dark.

items.title: FR, EN, RU — automatic
items.desc: Instant language detection. Your Russian, English and French guests are all served flawlessly.

items.title: Your team freed up
items.desc: AI handles routine questions. Your staff focuses on the in-person experience.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: One platform to manage the entire guest experience.

items.title: AI Concierge
items.desc: Responds like your best employee — natural, precise, available around the clock.

items.title: 3 Languages
items.desc: Automatic FR/EN/RU detection. Zero setup, zero translation errors.

items.title: Smart Booking
items.desc: Guests book directly via chat, synced with Google Calendar.

items.title: VIP Memory
items.desc: Recognises and personalises the welcome for every returning guest.

items.title: AI Google Reviews
items.desc: Personalised, professional replies drafted for every online review.

items.title: Real-time Dashboard
items.desc: All your messages, bookings and reviews in one place. Step in at any moment.

trust.label: Launching with select establishments in Monaco
trust.quote: Exactly what Monaco was missing — a digital concierge worthy of our clientele.
